_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: Cells were stained for the autophagy marker p62 (red). DAPI was used to counterstain cell nuclei (blue)
details: Successfully detected increased p62 expression in Y102-treated cells compared to DMSO control in immunofluorescence staining
